items.d: A decision that two or more people or groups are all happy with.
items.s: Fair Trade is an ___ that gives farmers a fair price.
items.hintDe: Wenn sich zwei Seiten auf etwas einigen.

items.d: Feeling very upset about a thing that is not fair.
items.s: The passengers were ___ about the long wait.
items.hintDe: Sehr wütend über etwas Ungerechtes.

items.d: To make people feel a little angry.
items.s: Please stop, you really ___ me when you do that.
items.hintDe: Jemanden ein bisschen wütend machen.

items.d: A two-wheel machine that you ride and move with your feet.
items.s: He likes to ride his ___ in the park.
items.hintDe: Ein Gefährt mit zwei Rädern, das du trittst.

items.d: The man who is married to your sister.
items.s: The man who married my sister is my ___.
items.hintDe: Der Mann, der deine Schwester geheiratet hat.

items.d: To tell people that a thing is true when you cannot prove it.
items.s: She ___ she can speak five tongues, but she cannot prove it.
items.hintDe: Etwas sagen, das vielleicht gar nicht stimmt.

items.d: To be stronger than the people you fight and take the victory.
items.s: He wants to ___ the best boxer in the world.
items.hintDe: Stärker sein und den anderen schlagen.

items.d: A way of selling that pays people in countries with little money a just price for what they make and sell.
items.s: The ___ project gives farmers more money for their products.
items.hintDe: Diese Organisation zahlt Bäuerinnen und Bauern einen gerechten Preis.

items.d: Treating all people in a just and honest way.
items.s: We want ___ for all people, both rich and not rich.
items.hintDe: Alle gleich und gerecht behandeln.

items.d: A man or woman who owns or works on land where food and animal life are raised.
items.s: My uncle is a ___ and he owns a farm with horses.
items.hintDe: Diese Person arbeitet auf einem Bauernhof.

items.d: A way of living in which people are at one and do not fight.
items.s: People of all races can live in ___.
items.hintDe: Friedlich und ohne Streit zusammenleben.

items.d: A very bad place where some people think bad people go when they are dead.
items.s: ___ is the opposite of a happy place after death.
items.hintDe: Der schlimme Ort, das Gegenteil vom Himmel.

items.d: Weak and with no way to stop a bad thing.
items.s: Without his glasses he was completely ___.
items.hintDe: Schwach und ohne Möglichkeit, sich zu helfen.

items.d: A man, woman or child; one of the people who live on Earth.
items.s: In the end, we are all just ___.
items.hintDe: Ein Mann, eine Frau oder ein Kind auf der Erde.

items.d: To make people feel bad, in the body or inside.
items.s: It ___ me to think that he would lie.
items.hintDe: Jemandem im Körper oder in den Gefühlen wehtun.

items.d: That makes people feel sad inside.
items.s: He is horrible and he likes to make ___ comments.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das die Gefühle anderer verletzt.

items.d: When you know very little about people or the world.
items.s: We can defeat racism, but first we must defeat ___.
items.hintDe: Wenn man wenig über andere oder die Welt weiß.

items.d: To become more in number; to go up.
items.s: The price of food can ___ from one year to the next.
items.hintDe: Mehr werden, nach oben gehen.

items.d: The opening of a book or speech that shows what it will be about.
items.s: He writes a short ___ at the start of his book.
items.hintDe: Der erste Teil eines Buches, der sagt, worum es geht.

items.d: To earn the money you need to pay for food, clothes and a home.
items.s: He could not ___ from his small farm.
items.hintDe: Genug Geld verdienen, um davon zu leben.

items.d: When people do not really know what you are like.
items.s: She often feels ___ because people do not really know her.
items.hintDe: Wenn andere falsch verstehen, wie du wirklich bist.

items.d: A thick dark wet from under the ground that we burn to run cars, planes and machines.
items.s: ___ is very precious in our society.
items.hintDe: Daraus macht man Benzin für Autos.

items.d: To be stronger than a fear or a bad thing in the end.
items.s: I want to ___ my fear of flying.
items.hintDe: Eine Angst oder ein Problem besiegen.

items.d: Making the body or the feeling inside hurt.
items.s: Losing a good friend can be very ___.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das im Körper oder in der Seele wehtut.

items.d: More money than before for the work you do.
items.s: After two years of good work, she asked her boss for a ___.
items.hintDe: Mehr Geld für deine Arbeit als vorher.

items.d: A thing that farmers put on their plants to stop fungus and small bugs.
items.s: A ___ is used to stop fungus and to protect the crops.
items.hintDe: Das spritzen Bäuerinnen und Bauern gegen Insekten auf die Pflanzen.

items.d: Dirty land, rivers and sky that is bad for people, plants and animal life.
items.s: ___ of the environment is bad for trees and rivers.
items.hintDe: Wenn Luft, Wasser und Boden schmutzig gemacht werden.

items.d: Feeling very happy about a good thing you or your family have done.
items.s: My parents were ___ of me when I did well at school.
items.hintDe: Sehr froh über etwas Gutes, das du geschafft hast.

items.d: When people are treated in a cruel way just because of where they or their family come from.
items.s: Long ago, black people in America had to live with ___ every day.
items.hintDe: Menschen wegen ihrer Herkunft schlecht behandeln.

items.d: Showing hate to people because of their skin or the land they come from.
items.s: He had to leave the band for making ___ comments.
items.hintDe: Beschreibt Worte oder Taten voller Rassismus.

items.d: How fast a thing happens, or how much of it there is in some time.
items.s: The number of crimes is rising at a fast ___.
items.hintDe: Sagt, wie schnell oder wie oft etwas passiert.

items.d: When people notice and thank you for the good work you have done.
items.s: The farmers want more money and more ___ for their work.
items.hintDe: Wenn Leute deine gute Arbeit sehen und loben.

items.d: To take the best ones from a bigger group.
items.s: The company will ___ the best beans and dry them.
items.hintDe: Die besten Stücke heraussuchen.

items.d: Feeling very upset because of a bad thing you did not think would happen.
items.s: She was ___ when she read about the accident.
items.hintDe: Sehr erschrocken über etwas Schlimmes.

items.d: When people are owned and have to work for no pay and are not free.
items.s: For two hundred years, black people in America had to live in ___.
items.hintDe: Wenn Menschen anderen gehören und ohne Lohn arbeiten müssen.

items.d: The man who is married to your daughter.
items.s: Your ___ is the man who married your daughter.
items.hintDe: Der Mann, der deine Tochter geheiratet hat.

items.d: Feeling that a thing happened that you did not think would happen.
items.s: I was really ___ to find a cake at school.
items.hintDe: Wenn etwas passiert, womit du nicht gerechnet hast.
